name: Getty Images Holdings, Inc.
description: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. is a preeminent global visual content creator and marketplace that offers a comprehensive range of content solutions, including high-quality creative and editorial photography, video, and music. Operating through its premier brands Getty Images, iStock, and Unsplash, the company serves creative, corporate, and media customers in almost every country around the world. Getty Images provides a vital archive of historical and contemporary imagery, helping customers tell inspiring stories and connect with audiences globally.
